leadText: Shadow End (Japanese: ダークエンド Dark End) is one of several Shadow moves available only in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness. Like other Shadow moves, it is forgotten and replaced with another move once the Pokémon is purified.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Shadow End deals damage, and the user takes recoil damage equal to half of its current HP. The recoil damage from this move is not prevented by Rock Head . As Shadow Pokémon cannot be traded, and since Pokémon Contests do not exist in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, Shadow End cannot be used in Contests.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description XD A shadowy aura ram attack that also rebounds on the user.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Shadow End has the highest power of all Shadow moves , with 120 base power, and is tied with Shadow Panic for the lowest accuracy, with only 60% accuracy. Shadow End is the only Shadow move in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness that causes recoil damage. Shadow End is used exclusively by Shadow Pokémon owned by Greevil and his two bodyguards/sons Ardos and Eldes .
